usage.headings: Use 'Chivo' for all main headings. Don't be afraid of uppercase for short titles.
usage.body: Use 'Manrope' for all UI text, inputs, and long descriptions.
usage.gradient_text: Use bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-accent for key words in H1.

usage_rules.gradients: Use 'bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-600/20 to-indigo-900/20' for card backgrounds to give depth.
usage_rules.glassmorphism: Use 'bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10' for overlays and sticky headers.
usage_rules.glows: Use 'shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)]' for active states or primary buttons.

textures.noise: Add a subtle fixed noise overlay to the body background opacity-5 pointer-events-none.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-glow transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm py-3 px-8
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 border border-white/5 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-200 font-medium text-sm py-3 px-6

inputs.prominent: bg-black/50 border-2 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 text-xl md:text-2xl p-6 md:p-8 rounded-2xl w-full transition-all placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 shadow-inner focus:shadow-glow focus:outline-none

cards.format_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-card/50 hover:bg-card/80 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-primary/50 hover:scale-[1.02] cursor-pointer h-64 md:h-80 flex flex-col justify-end p-6
cards.glass_card: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6

modals.full_screen: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 duration-300

landing_page.hero: Flex column, centered content but asymmetrical background elements. Massive H1.
landing_page.input_section: Sticky bottom or central focus. The input is the 'hero' interaction.

format_selector.grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6 w-full max-w-6xl mx-auto
format_selector.mobile: On mobile, strictly 2 columns. Cards should be tall (aspect ratio 3:4 or 9:16) to preview the vertical video format.

video_player.container: aspect-[9/16] max-h-[85vh] w-full max-w-sm mx-auto bg-black rounded-3xl overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl border border-white/10
video_player.overlays: Absolute positioning for subtitles (bottom), memes (slide-in from sides), and news tickers (bottom edge).

critical: IMPLEMENT DARK MODE ONLY. This is a creative tool, light mode will break the immersion.
The 'Format Selector' must be a full-screen modal that feels like entering a new dimension. Use heavy blur (backdrop-blur-2xl).
Do not use default Shadcn cards for the format selection. Make them image-heavy with text overlays.
Ensure the 9:16 aspect ratio is strictly enforced for the video preview area.
The Input field should be the centerpiece of the home page. Make it huge.
file_structure_notes: Create custom components in /app/frontend/src/components/custom for specific UI like VideoPlayer, FormatCard, etc.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 for icons.
